headline: Is It Too Late To Consider NextEra Energy (NEE) After A 34% One Year Rally?
summary: For investors wondering whether NextEra Energy's share price still offers value or if most of the opportunity is already priced in, this article examines what the current market price might be implying about the business. With the stock closing at US$92.05 and returns of 2.0% over 7 days, 13.7% year to date and 33.7% over the past year, many investors are considering whether recent gains and past performance are still aligned with fundamentals. Recent attention on the company has focused on...
